query: how to configure BM25 retrieval parameters

corpus.content:
## BM25 Configuration

The BM25 retrieval algorithm uses k1=1.5 and b=0.75 by default. The k1 parameter controls term frequency saturation, while b controls document length normalization. These can be adjusted in the retrieval module. Lower k1 values reduce the impact of term frequency; lower b values reduce length normalization.

## BM25 Tuning Guidelines

For short queries, increase k1 to 2.0. For long documents, decrease b to 0.5. The smoothed Robertson IDF formula prevents negative scores when a term appears in many documents.

## Cooking Recipes

To make pasta, boil water first. Add salt to the boiling water before adding the pasta. Cook for the time specified on the package. Drain and serve with your favourite sauce.

## Embedding Backends

DepthFusion supports multiple embedding backends: local sentence-transformers, OpenAI text-embedding-ada-002, and Cohere embed-english-v3. The backend is configured via DEPTHFUSION_EMBEDDING_BACKEND environment variable. Local mode uses sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2 by default, requiring no API keys.

## Configuring Semantic Search

Semantic search requires an embedding model. Set DEPTHFUSION_EMBEDDING_BACKEND=local for offline operation. The embedding vectors are cached in ~/.local/share/depthfusion/embeddings/ to avoid recomputation on repeated queries.

## Weather Patterns

Monsoon season typically begins in June. Heavy rainfall can disrupt outdoor activities. Always check the forecast before planning events. Temperature drops significantly during winter months.

description: How project scoping restricts recall to relevant documents

corpus.content:
## Project Scoping

DepthFusion supports project-scoped recall using the set_scope tool. When a scope is active, all recall operations filter documents to those tagged with the current project path. Set scope with depthfusion_set_scope(path='/home/user/projects/myproject'). Clear scope with depthfusion_set_scope(path=None).

## Scope Filter Implementation

The project scope filter is applied before BM25 scoring. Documents must have a matching project_path tag to pass the filter. This ensures that recall for a Python project does not surface memories from a JavaScript project. The filter uses prefix matching on absolute paths.

## Football Season

The league begins in August and runs through May. Teams compete in home and away matches. Points are awarded for wins and draws. The team with the most points at the end of the season wins the championship.

description: How to load prior session state into a new conversation

corpus.content:
## Session Loading

DepthFusion persists session context to disk after each conversation. Use depthfusion_recall_relevant with session_only=True to load prior session memories. Sessions are stored in ~/.claude/sessions/ as JSONL files. Each entry contains the timestamp, role, and content of each conversation turn.

## Restoring Prior Context

To restore a prior session, use the context-restore skill. This reads the latest session file from ~/.claude/sessions/ and injects the summary into the current context. Session files are rotated daily. The most recent 7 days of sessions are retained by default.

## Stock Market Basics

Stocks represent ownership in a company. Prices fluctuate based on supply and demand. Dividends are payments made to shareholders. Index funds provide diversified exposure to many companies simultaneously.

query: MCP tool schema and input validation
description: MCP tool parameter schemas and validation rules

corpus.content:
## MCP Tool Schema

Each MCP tool defines its input schema using JSON Schema. The depthfusion_recall_relevant tool accepts: query (string, required), top_k (integer, default 5), scope (string, optional). All inputs are validated against the schema before processing. Invalid inputs return a structured error response with the validation message.

## Input Validation Rules

MCP tool inputs must pass JSON Schema validation. Required fields that are missing cause an immediate error. The query field must be a non-empty string. top_k must be a positive integer between 1 and 50. The scope field, when provided, must be an absolute file path.

## Music Theory

A major scale consists of seven notes with whole and half step intervals. The pattern is W-W-H-W-W-W-H. Common chords include major, minor, and diminished triads. Harmony is created when multiple notes are played simultaneously.

query: graph traversal and knowledge graph nodes
description: Graph structure and traversal operations in DepthFusion

corpus.content:
## Graph Traversal

DepthFusion maintains a knowledge graph of discovered concepts and their relationships. Use depthfusion_graph_traverse to walk the graph starting from a seed node. The traversal returns connected nodes up to a configurable depth (default 2). Nodes represent concepts, files, or sessions. Edges represent relationships like 'relates_to', 'referenced_by', and 'extends'.

## Knowledge Graph Nodes

Graph nodes have: id (unique identifier), type (concept/file/session), content (text snippet), and metadata (timestamps, source, tags). The graph is stored in ~/.local/share/depthfusion/graph.db as a SQLite database. Node IDs are stable content hashes, so identical content produces the same node.

## World Geography

The Amazon River flows through Brazil and is the largest river by discharge volume. The Sahara Desert covers most of North Africa. The Himalayas contain the world's highest peaks including Mount Everest at 8849 metres above sea level.

query: recall feedback scoring and memory scores
description: How feedback affects memory scores and future retrieval ranking

corpus.content:
## Feedback Scoring

DepthFusion uses feedback signals to adjust memory scores over time. When a recalled block is marked helpful (thumbs up), its score increases by 0.1. When marked unhelpful (thumbs down), its score decreases by 0.1. Scores are clamped to [0.0, 1.0]. Higher-scored memories appear earlier in recall results for similar future queries.

## Memory Score Adjustment

Use depthfusion_recall_feedback to submit feedback for a recalled block. Provide the block_id and feedback type (positive or negative). The score update is applied atomically using file locking to prevent race conditions when multiple sessions provide feedback simultaneously.

## Cell Biology

Cells are the basic unit of life. Eukaryotic cells have a nucleus containing DNA. Mitochondria produce ATP through cellular respiration. Cell division occurs through mitosis for growth and meiosis for sexual reproduction.

description: How DepthFusion resolves which retrieval mode to use

corpus.content:
## Mode Resolution

DepthFusion supports three retrieval modes: local (BM25 only, no API keys needed), hybrid (BM25 plus reranking), and semantic (embedding-based). Mode is resolved at startup from DEPTHFUSION_MODE environment variable. If the variable is unset, mode defaults to 'local'. Hybrid and semantic modes require additional API keys.

## Provider Switching

Switch providers at runtime using depthfusion_set_scope with the mode parameter. Available providers: bm25 (always available), cohere-rerank (requires COHERE_API_KEY), openai-embed (requires OPENAI_API_KEY). The system falls back to bm25 if the configured provider is unavailable due to missing keys or network errors.

## Stellar Astronomy

Stars form from clouds of gas and dust called nebulae. Our Sun is a medium-sized yellow dwarf star. Red giants form when stars exhaust their hydrogen fuel. White dwarfs are the remnants of low-mass stars after they shed their outer layers.
